# Sham Karthik S — Senior AI/ML Engineer

> On-device AI · Computer Vision · Edge Inference · Cross-platform Mobile · Full-stack Web

## Profile

Sham Karthik S is a Senior AI/ML Engineer at Tiger Analytics (Jan 2023–Present) based in Chennai, India. He builds production AI systems deployed on mobile and edge devices, with deep expertise in on-device computer vision, fraud detection, and cross-platform engineering. Previously a Software Engineer at Hexaware Technologies.

## Core Facts

- Full name: Sham Karthik S
- Title: Senior AI/ML Engineer
- Employer: Tiger Analytics (Jan 2023–Present)
- Previous: Software Engineer at Hexaware Technologies (total 4 years)
- Location: Chennai, India
- Languages: English (fluent), Tamil (native)
- Email: shamkarthik88@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/shamkarthik
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/sham-karthik-s
- Medium: https://medium.com/@shamkarthik88
- Resume PDF: https://shamkarthik.github.io/ShamkarthikS.pdf

## Projects (9+)

### Work Projects at Tiger Analytics
1. **AIGronomist** — On-device potato disease detection using computer vision models deployed on mobile devices
2. **PepIris** — On-device fraud detection CV system for financial transaction monitoring
3. **Mobile R&D — GenAI** — Generative AI research and prototyping for mobile platforms
4. **Innovation Incrementality V2** — Incrementality measurement and innovation impact analysis
5. **App Templates** — Cross-platform mobile application templates and architecture patterns

### Work Projects at Hexaware Technologies
6. **RapidX** — Rapid application development framework
7. **Automaton** — Process automation and workflow optimization system

### Personal Projects
8. **TLDR-ON** — Chrome extension for AI-powered text summarization (available on Chrome Web Store)
9. **PayFinder** — Payment discovery and management tool

## Skills

- **Languages**: TypeScript/JavaScript, Python, C++, Dart, Kotlin, SQL
- **Frontend**: React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, HTML5/CSS3
- **Mobile**: React Native, Flutter, Kotlin Multiplatform, Android (Kotlin/Java)
- **AI/ML**: ONNX Runtime, TensorFlow Lite, Core ML, Computer Vision, Edge Inference, GenAI
- **Backend/Cloud**: Node.js, Azure, Docker, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), REST APIs
- **Tools**: Git, VS Code, Postman, Figma, Firebase, Webpack/Vite

## Site Structure

This is a single-page React app (Vite + Tailwind CSS v4 + Framer Motion) deployed at https://shamkarthik.github.io.

### Pages
- **`/` (Home)** — Hero section, featured projects, ServiceCards, SkillsSection, Timeline, impact metrics
- **`/blog`** — Latest Medium articles auto-fetched from RSS feed
- **`/contact`** — Contact info, resume download, email and LinkedIn links
- **`/contributions`** — GitHub contribution graph, GitHub stats, recent activity

### Technical Stack
- React 19 + TypeScript
- Vite (build tool)
- Tailwind CSS v4 (utility-first CSS)
- Framer Motion (animations)
- React Router (client-side routing)
- Canvas API (background effects)
- RSS-to-JSON (Medium feed integration)

## Features

- **Background effects** — Subtle visual enhancements using Canvas API
- **Dark/Light theme** — Full theme support via `data-theme` attribute on `<html>`.
- **AI Chat** — WebLLM-powered local AI chat (GPT-2/Phi-3) running entirely in the browser via WebGPU. No server, no API key needed. Sham's personal AI agent with full knowledge of his background.
- **Animated counters** — Impact metrics animate on scroll.
- **Responsive** — Works on mobile, tablet, and desktop.

## Special Notes

- This is a portfolio site — all content is about Sham Karthik S.
- The site uses client-side rendering with React Router (HashRouter).
- Blog content is pulled live from Medium RSS — no caching layer.
- The chat runs 100% client-side using WebLLM; no data leaves the browser.
